feature: Verify 005-phase3-ssot: SSOT params + robot_description Phase 3 changes
workflow_rationale: Verification task for a pure file-editing implementation (YAML updates + markdown docs). No services to run, no build step. Sequential verification commands validate data correctness, schema compliance, cross-file consistency, and acceptance criteria.

phases.name: YAML File Validation
phases.description: Checkout 005 branch files and validate YAML parsing, schema compliance, and exact parameter values for physics.yaml and control.yaml

subtasks.description: Validate params/physics.yaml: (1) YAML parses without errors, (2) total_mass.value == 0.632, (3) per_link_masses section exists with all 7 links (base, shoulder, upper_arm, lower_arm, wrist, gripper, jaw), (4) per-link mass sum == 0.632, (5) each per_link_masses entry has value and unit fields, (6) existing simulation/friction/contact/damping sections are preserved unchanged, (7) header comment updated from Phase 0 to Phase 3
subtasks.notes: All 7 verification checks PASSED against auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot branch: (1) YAML parses OK, (2) total_mass=0.632, (3) per_link_masses has 7 links, (4) mass sum=0.632, (5) value+unit fields present, (6) simulation/friction/contact/damping preserved, (7) header updated to Phase 3

subtasks.description: Validate params/control.yaml: (1) YAML parses without errors, (2) joint_names has 6 entries matching expected names, (3) decimation == 10, (4) drive.stiffness == 40.0, drive.damping == 4.0, drive.max_effort == 5.0, (5) joint_limits.position_min/max have 6 entries with correct radians, (6) per_joint_overrides is uncommented and has all 6 joints with correct values, (7) control_frequency == 20.0, (8) header comment updated to Phase 3
subtasks.notes: All 8 verification checks PASSED against auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot branch: (1) YAML parses OK, (2) joint_names has 6 entries [shoulder_pan, shoulder_lift, elbow_flex, wrist_flex, wrist_roll, gripper], (3) decimation=10, (4) drive stiffness=40.0, damping=4.0, max_effort=5.0, (5) position_min/max have correct 6-entry radian values, (6) per_joint_overrides uncommented with all 6 joints at stiffness=40.0/damping=4.0, (7) control_frequency=20.0, (8) header updated to Phase 3

phases.name: Cross-File Consistency Checks
phases.description: Verify consistency between physics.yaml, control.yaml, and robot_description/README.md values

subtasks.description: Cross-validate: (1) per_link_masses sum in physics.yaml matches total_mass, (2) joint_names count in control.yaml matches joint_limits array lengths, (3) decimation value (10) is consistent with sim_timestep (0.005s) and control_frequency (20Hz): 1/(0.005*20) = 10, (4) robot_description/README.md mass table matches physics.yaml per_link_masses, (5) robot_description/README.md joint table matches control.yaml joint_limits

verification.command:
git show auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot:params/physics.yaml > /tmp/verify_physics.yaml && git show auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot:params/control.yaml > /tmp/verify_control.yaml && python3 -c "
import yaml, sys
phy = yaml.safe_load(open('/tmp/verify_physics.yaml'))
ctl = yaml.safe_load(open('/tmp/verify_control.yaml'))
errs = []
# 1. mass sum == total_mass
plm = phy['mass']['per_link_masses']
mass_sum = round(sum(v['value'] for v in plm.values()), 3)
total = phy['mass']['total_mass']['value']
if mass_sum != total:
    errs.append(f'mass sum {mass_sum} != total_mass {total}')
# 2. joint count consistency
n_names = len(ctl['joint_names']['value'])
n_min = len(ctl['joint_limits']['position_min']['value'])
n_max = len(ctl['joint_limits']['position_max']['value'])
n_vel = len(ctl['joint_limits']['velocity_max']['value'])
if not (n_names == n_min == n_max == n_vel == 6):
    errs.append(f'joint count mismatch: names={n_names}, min={n_min}, max={n_max}, vel={n_vel}')
# 3. decimation consistency
dt = phy['simulation']['timestep']['value']
freq = ctl['control_frequency']['value']
expected_dec = int(1.0 / (dt * freq))
actual_dec = ctl['decimation']['value']
if actual_dec != expected_dec:
    errs.append(f'decimation={actual_dec}, expected 1/({dt}*{freq})={expected_dec}')
if errs:
    print('FAIL: ' + '; '.join(errs))
    sys.exit(1)
print('OK: Cross-validation passed')
"

subtasks.notes: All 5 cross-validation checks PASSED: (1) per_link_masses sum 0.632 == total_mass 0.632, (2) joint_names/position_min/position_max/velocity_max all have 6 entries, (3) decimation=10 == 1/(0.005*20.0), (4) robot_description/README.md mass table matches physics.yaml per_link_masses for all 7 links, (5) robot_description/README.md joint table matches control.yaml joint_names for all 6 joints

phases.name: Documentation Verification
phases.description: Verify all documentation updates: robot_description/README.md, params/README.md, docs/phase-checklist.md

subtasks.description: Verify robot_description/README.md: (1) contains URDF source info (SO-ARM100, TheRobotStudio, onshape-to-robot), (2) contains joint summary table with 6 joints, (3) contains link/mass summary table with 7 links, (4) lists 8 STL mesh files, (5) references params/control.yaml and params/physics.yaml for detailed values
subtasks.notes: All 5 verification checks PASSED against auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot branch: (1) URDF source references present: SO-ARM100, TheRobotStudio, onshape-to-robot, (2) Joint summary table has all 6 joints: shoulder_pan, shoulder_lift, elbow_flex, wrist_flex, wrist_roll, gripper, (3) Link/mass summary table has all 7 links: base, shoulder, upper_arm, lower_arm, wrist, gripper, jaw with correct masses summing to 0.632kg, (4) 8+ STL file references found (base.stl, shoulder.stl, upper_arm.stl, lower_arm.stl, wrist.stl, wrist_roll.stl, gripper.stl, jaw.stl), (5) Cross-references to params/control.yaml and params/physics.yaml present

subtasks.description: Verify docs/phase-checklist.md: All 6 Phase 3 checkboxes are marked as [x] (completed). Verify that earlier phases (0) remain correctly marked, and later phases (4-7) remain unchecked.

verification.command:
git show auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot:docs/phase-checklist.md > /tmp/verify_checklist.md && python3 -c "
import re, sys
content = open('/tmp/verify_checklist.md').read()
errs = []
# Find Phase 3 section
phase3_match = re.search(r'## Phase 3.*?(?=## Phase 4|$)', content, re.DOTALL)
if not phase3_match:
    errs.append('Phase 3 section not found')
else:
    p3 = phase3_match.group()
    checked = len(re.findall(r'- \[x\]', p3))
    unchecked = len(re.findall(r'- \[ \]', p3))
    if checked < 6:
        errs.append(f'Phase 3: only {checked} checked items, expected 6')
    if unchecked > 0:
        errs.append(f'Phase 3: {unchecked} items still unchecked')
# Verify Phase 0 still checked
phase0_match = re.search(r'## Phase 0.*?(?=## Phase 1|$)', content, re.DOTALL)
if phase0_match:
    p0 = phase0_match.group()
    p0_unchecked = len(re.findall(r'- \[ \]', p0))
    if p0_unchecked > 0:
        errs.append(f'Phase 0: {p0_unchecked} items became unchecked')
# Verify Phase 4+ still unchecked (not accidentally checked)
for phase_num in [4, 5, 6, 7]:
    pat = rf'## Phase {phase_num}.*?(?=## Phase {phase_num+1}|$)'
    m = re.search(pat, content, re.DOTALL)
    if m:
        checked_count = len(re.findall(r'- \[x\]', m.group()))
        if checked_count > 0:
            errs.append(f'Phase {phase_num}: {checked_count} items incorrectly checked')
if errs:
    print('FAIL: ' + '; '.join(errs))
    sys.exit(1)
print('OK: phase-checklist.md validated')
"

subtasks.notes: All 6 Phase 3 checkboxes marked as [x]. Phase 0 remains checked. Phases 1-2 and 4-7 remain unchecked. Verification script passed: OK: phase-checklist.md validated

subtasks.description: Verify params/README.md: Updated from Phase 0 placeholder language to Phase 3 actual values language. Should reference Phase 2 verification (sanity_checks.py, min_controller.py).

verification.command:
git show auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot:params/README.md > /tmp/verify_params_readme.md && python3 -c "
import sys
content = open('/tmp/verify_params_readme.md').read()
errs = []
# Should NOT contain 'placeholder' language
if 'placeholder' in content.lower():
    errs.append('still contains placeholder language')
# Should reference Phase 3 or actual values
if 'Phase 3' not in content and '실측' not in content and '실제' not in content:
    errs.append('no reference to Phase 3 or actual/measured values')
if errs:
    print('FAIL: ' + '; '.join(errs))
    sys.exit(1)
print('OK: params/README.md validated')
"

subtasks.notes: Fixed params/README.md: (1) Removed 'placeholder' language from YAML example comment (changed '현재 값 (placeholder일 수 있음)' to '현재 값 (Phase 3 실측값 반영 완료)'), (2) Updated SSOT section from Phase 0 placeholder language to Phase 3 actual values language, (3) Added Phase 2 verification references (sanity_checks.py, min_controller.py). Verification passes: no placeholder language found, Phase 3 and 실제/실측 references present.

phases.name: YAML Schema Compliance
phases.description: Verify that all YAML parameters follow the project schema convention (value, unit, range, description fields) and use snake_case keys

subtasks.description: Verify YAML schema compliance for physics.yaml: Every top-level parameter should have value, unit, and description fields. Check that per_link_masses entries have at minimum value and unit. Verify all keys are snake_case.
subtasks.notes: physics.yaml is fully schema compliant. All leaf parameters have value, unit, and description fields. All keys use snake_case. No modifications were needed. Verification script passes with: OK: physics.yaml schema compliant

subtasks.description: Verify YAML schema compliance for control.yaml: Every parameter should have value, unit, and description fields (except per_joint_overrides which has a different structure). Verify all keys are snake_case.
subtasks.notes: control.yaml is fully schema compliant. All checks passed: (1) Standard params (control_frequency, decimation, action_delay, observation_delay, action_scale) have value/unit/description, (2) Drive sub-params (stiffness, damping, max_effort) have value/unit/description, (3) joint_names has value/unit/description, (4) joint_limits sub-params (position_min, position_max, velocity_max) have value/unit/description, (5) per_joint_overrides keys are snake_case (shoulder_pan, shoulder_lift, elbow_flex, wrist_flex, wrist_roll, gripper), (6) All 9 top-level keys and all nested keys use snake_case. No modifications needed.

phases.name: Acceptance Criteria Sign-off
phases.description: Final check of all acceptance criteria from the original spec. This is the overall pass/fail gate.

subtasks.description: Run all acceptance criteria checks in a single comprehensive script: (1) physics.yaml measured values, (2) control.yaml calibrated values, (3) all parameters have unit/range docs, (4) robot_description/README.md has URDF source, (5) 8 STL mesh files documented, (6) phase-checklist Phase 3 complete. Output a summary report.

verification.command:
git show auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot:params/physics.yaml > /tmp/v_phy.yaml && git show auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot:params/control.yaml > /tmp/v_ctl.yaml && git show auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot:robot_description/README.md > /tmp/v_rdesc.md && git show auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot:docs/phase-checklist.md > /tmp/v_checklist.md && python3 -c "
import yaml, re, sys
phy = yaml.safe_load(open('/tmp/v_phy.yaml'))
ctl = yaml.safe_load(open('/tmp/v_ctl.yaml'))
rdesc = open('/tmp/v_rdesc.md').read()
checklist = open('/tmp/v_checklist.md').read()

results = []
def check(name, condition):
    results.append((name, condition))

# AC1: physics.yaml measured values
check('AC1-total_mass', phy['mass']['total_mass']['value'] == 0.632)
check('AC1-per_link_masses', 'per_link_masses' in phy['mass'] and len(phy['mass']['per_link_masses']) == 7)
check('AC1-mass_sum', round(sum(v['value'] for v in phy['mass']['per_link_masses'].values()), 3) == 0.632)

# AC2: control.yaml calibrated values
check('AC2-joint_limits_min', ctl['joint_limits']['position_min']['value'] == [-1.9199, -1.7453, -1.5708, -1.6581, -2.7925, 0.1745])
check('AC2-joint_limits_max', ctl['joint_limits']['position_max']['value'] == [1.9199, 1.7453, 1.5708, 1.6581, 2.7925, 1.7453])
check('AC2-drive_Kp', ctl['drive']['stiffness']['value'] == 40.0)
check('AC2-drive_Kd', ctl['drive']['damping']['value'] == 4.0)
check('AC2-joint_names', len(ctl['joint_names']['value']) == 6)

# AC3: unit/range documentation
check('AC3-physics_units', all('unit' in phy['mass']['per_link_masses'][l] for l in phy['mass']['per_link_masses']))
check('AC3-control_units', all('unit' in ctl[p] for p in ['control_frequency', 'decimation', 'action_scale']))

# AC4: URDF source in robot_description/README.md
check('AC4-urdf_source', 'SO-ARM100' in rdesc and 'onshape-to-robot' in rdesc)

# AC5: 8 mesh files documented
check('AC5-mesh_files', rdesc.count('.stl') >= 8)

# AC6: phase-checklist Phase 3 complete
p3 = re.search(r'## Phase 3.*?(?=## Phase 4|$)', checklist, re.DOTALL)
if p3:
    check('AC6-phase3_checked', len(re.findall(r'- \[x\]', p3.group())) >= 6 and len(re.findall(r'- \[ \]', p3.group())) == 0)
else:
    check('AC6-phase3_found', False)

print('=== ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA REPORT ===')
all_pass = True
for name, passed in results:
    status = 'PASS' if passed else 'FAIL'
    if not passed:
        all_pass = False
    print(f'  [{status}] {name}')
print('=================================')
if all_pass:
    print('OK: All acceptance criteria passed')
else:
    print('FAIL: Some acceptance criteria failed')
    sys.exit(1)
"

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1, different verification targets (docs vs schema)

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Sequential is optimal — all verifications are fast Python commands, parallel overhead not justified

acceptance_criteria: params/physics.yaml에 실제 측정값 반영 (total_mass=0.632kg, per-link masses)
params/control.yaml에 교정된 조인트 리밋(radians), 검증된 드라이브 게인(Kp=40, Kd=4), 조인트 이름 리스트
robot_description/README.md에 URDF 출처(SO-ARM100 repo, onshape-to-robot) 문서화
URDF 내 참조 메쉬 8개 전부 meshes/에 존재 확인 (documented — actual files require Phase 1 download)

verification_steps.name: YAML Parse Validation
verification_steps.command: git show auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot:params/physics.yaml > /tmp/v.yaml && python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('/tmp/v.yaml')); print('OK')" && git show auto-claude/005-phase3-ssot:params/control.yaml > /tmp/v.yaml && python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('/tmp/v.yaml')); print('OK')"
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Both YAML files parse without errors

verification_steps.name: Control Values Check
verification_steps.command: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('/tmp/v_ctl.yaml')); assert d['decimation']['value']==10; assert len(d['joint_names']['value'])==6; print('OK')"

verification_strategy.reasoning: Low risk — verifying pure YAML value updates and markdown documentation. All expected values are known a priori from Phase 2 verification data. No runtime code, no service dependencies.

commands: python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('/tmp/v_phy.yaml')); yaml.safe_load(open('/tmp/v_ctl.yaml')); print('YAML parse OK')"

python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('/tmp/v_phy.yaml')); plm=d['mass']['per_link_masses']; s=round(sum(v['value'] for v in plm.values()),3); assert s==0.632, f'mass sum={s}'; print('Mass check OK')"
python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('/tmp/v_ctl.yaml')); assert d['decimation']['value']==10; assert len(d['joint_names']['value'])==6; print('Control check OK')"
